customAttributes.description:
Equipped creature gets +1/+0.
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, transform Elbrus, the Binding Blade.
Equip 1
//
Withengar Unbound
Flying, intimidate, trample

Whenever a player loses the game, put thirteen +1/+1 counters on Withengar Unbound.
customAttributes.fullType: Legendary Artifact — Equipment // Legendary Creature — Demon
customAttributes.flavorText:
Those who grasp its hilt soon hear the demon's call.
//
There are not enough lives on Innistrad to satisfy his thirst for retribution.
